header.place.start: You must place your 4 starting tiles
header.place.start.players: Players must place their 4 starting tiles
header.rotate: Turn the store <1>↺</1> <0>↻</0> or <2>validate its orientation</2>
header.rotate.player: {player} must choose the orientation of the store
header.place: Place your tile in your playing area
header.place.player: {player} must place their tile in their play area
header.place.players: The players must place their tile in their playing area.
header.grandfinal: Choose a rocket tile to trigger your Grande Finale
header.grandfinal.player: {player} must choose a tile to trigger their Grande Finale
header.grandfinal.players: Players must choose a tile to trigger their Grande Finale
help.store.active: Each turn, the active player chooses the orientation of the Artificer's Store, and each player receives the tile opposite him.
help.firework.text: This Fireworks tile produces {number, plural, one{# explosion} other{# explosions}} of {color, select, 1{blue} 2{green} 3{red} other{yellow}} color.
help.firework.store: This tile is in the Artificer's Store.
help.firework.panorama.mine: This tile is in your play area.
help.firework.panorama.player: This tile is in the play area of {player}.
help.firework.non-exploded: It hasn't exploded yet, it's on the Rocket side.
help.firework.exploded: It has exploded and is now on the Explosion side.
help.firework.arrow: Arrows <0/> indicate which rocket explodes in a chain when the chain explodes.
help.firework.extinguish: Sparks <0/> earn an Applause token when placed face to face to form a complete spark.
help.firework.starting: This tile is part of the player {number}'s starting set.
help.store.rotation.here: You can <0>orient the shop</0> so that you can play this tile.
help.store.rotation.validate: This tile is facing you, so you can <0>validate the orientation</0> of the store to play it.
help.firework.pile.count: There are {number, plural, one{# tile} other{# tiles}} left in this stack, so there are as many rounds to play.
help.firework.flip: You can <0>turn this tile</0> to trigger your Grande Finale.
help.composition.text: Form this composition with Explosion tiles to earn {number} points and turn the corresponding Rocket tiles over.
help.composition.color.text: Squares with <0>colors</0> indicate the color of the explosion required (regardless of the number of explosions on it).
help.composition.pattern.text: Squares with <0>explosions</0> indicate the number of explosions required on the tile (regardless of color).
help.composition.blank: White squares represent any Explosion face tile.
help.composition.rotation: Compositions can be rotated in any direction, but not mirrored.
help.applause.vp: Each Applause token is worth 1 victory point.
help.applause.vp-for-less: At the end of the game, each player earns 3 victory points for each player with strictly fewer Applause tokens.
help.applause.count: You have {number, plural, one{# Applause token} other{# Applause tokens}}.
help.applause.count.player: {player} has {number, plural, one{# Applause token} other{# Applause tokens}}.
help.chinese-sign.vp: This card gives additional victory points at the end of the game, depending on each player's achievement.
help.chinese-sign.score: You have won {score, plural, one {# point} other{# points}} with this card
help.chinese-sign.1: Goat: 3 points for each <0>column</0> with a single 1-explosion tile. If a column has more than one 1-explosion tile (or none), it scores no points.
help.chinese-sign.2: Rooster: 3 points for each 3-explosion tile forming a <0>complete</0> Spark.
help.chinese-sign.3: Snake: 5 points for each red explosion tile <0>framed on all 4 edges</0>.
help.chinese-sign.4: Rat: 3 points for each yellow explosion tile <0>diagonally adjacent</0> to another yellow explosion tile.
help.chinese-sign.5: Dragon: 2 points for each <0>complete</0> Spark at the end of the game.
help.chinese-sign.6: Bull: 5 points for each <0>column</0> with the 4 types of explosion: 1 / 2 / 3 and 4 explosions.
help.chinese-sign.7: Rabbit: 5 points per pair of <0>orthogonally adjacent</0> 2-explosion tiles (horizontally or vertically).
help.chinese-sign.8: Dog: 3 points for each <0>border</0> 4-explosion tile (with at least one free edge).
help.chinese-sign.9: Tiger: 3 points per tile in the <0>largest group</0> of blue lights. A group consists of tiles adjacent on at least one side.
help.chinese-sign.10: Monkey: 2 points for each green explosion tile <0>orthogonally adjacent</0> to another green explosion tile.
help.chinese-sign.11: Pig: 2 points for each pair of arrows <0>facing each other<0/>: <1/>. The two arrows must point at each other.
help.chinese-sign.12: Horse: 5 points for each <0>line</0> with all 4 different colors.
tuto.goal: In this game, you have to create fireworks compositions by judiciously placing your rockets.
tuto.starting: Here are your 4 starting Fireworks tiles. Each tile has <0>a color</0> and a <0>number of explosions</0>.
tuto.composition: Voici vos 4 compositions de départ. Les 2 premières imposent des <0>couleurs d'explosion</0>, les 2 autres des <0>nombres d'explosions</0>.
tuto.starting.place: You start by placing your 4 starting tiles in front of you.
tuto.place: Place your {color, select, 1{blue} 2{green} 3{red} other{yellow}} tile here.
tuto.validate: Confirm the placement by clicking on the button in the header.
tuto.start: Now that each player has placed their 4 starting tiles, the game can begin!
tuto.active: This token identifies the active player: in this case, you.
tuto.store: This is the Fireworks store. The active player has the privilege of orienting the store in the direction of their choice, which determines which tile each player will play on this turn.
tuto.rotate: You're particularly interested in this tile: orient the store so that it's in front of you. Once it's in front of you, click on "Confirm" in the header so that each player can play their tile.
tuto.take.place: Take the tile and place it here. <0>You cannot change the orientation of the tile</0>: the rockets must always face upwards.
tuto.explode: When you play a tile, it's immediately flipped to its Explosion side, and then each arrow pointing to a Rocket side tile <0>explodes it in turn</0>, and so on!
tuto.will-explode: This rocket will now explode too.
tuto.chain: And so on, these 3 other rockets will also explode one after the other.
tuto.compo.phase: Now that your explosions are complete, you have the option of <0>completing a composition</0>.
tuto.compo.validate:
Compositions can be completed in either direction (but not mirrored): you therefore have the option of completing one of these 2 compositions.
<1>An Explosion face tile can only validate one composition at a time.</1>
tuto.compo.pattern: Complete one of these compositions by clicking on all the tiles that compose it, then on the matching composition.
tuto.compo.explain: When you complete a composition, the tiles that make it up are turned face up: they can explode again in future rounds.
tuto.compo.new: The composition is turned face-down (you will score {points} points for it at the end of the game), then you draw a new composition of the same type.
tuto.compo.pass: Once you think you've completed all your compositions, click on the <0>pass</0> button in the header.
tuto.newround: It's a new turn! Your opponent is the active player, and will choose the Store's orientation.
tuto.place.2: Take your tile and place it here.
tuto.extinguish: By placing this tile, you have formed a complete spark. You earn an Applause token, worth 1 point; in addition, you'll earn 3 more points for each opponent whose Applause token you have at the end of the game.
tuto.end:
The game continues in this way until the Store is empty: you therefore play 12 rounds.
<0>Note that the tile you place each round can replace an existing one.</0> So you'll have a maximum of 16 tiles in play at the end.
tuto.grandefinale:
At the end of the game, you can make your <0>Grande Finale</0> by exploding as many rockets as possible. To do this:
- Place all of your tiles Rocket side up
- Choose one Rocket and flip it to its Explosion side
- Resolve the chain reaction that you’ve triggered.
If your Grande Finale is perfect (all your rockets explode), you win 3 Applause tokens.
tuto.scoring:
During the scoring, tally your victory points as follows:
- 1 point for each tile with an Explosion face after the Grande Finale.
- 1 point for each Applause token, plus 3 points for each opponent with fewer Applause tokens.
- the sum of the points for the compositions completed.
The player with the highest total wins. He/she is awarded the title of Emperor's Artificer.
tuto.go: It's up to you now. Good luck, master artificer!
tuto.over:
Congratulations, you've completed the tutorial!
Ready to play with other players?
